items.placeName: InterContinental Phu Quoc Long Beach Resort by IHG

facebook.caption: If you're looking for a beachfront base that genuinely earns its five-star reputation, InterContinental Phu Quoc Long Beach Resort delivers on every count. Set along Bãi Trường, one of the island's longest and most beautiful stretches of sand, this resort combines chic rooms and suites with multiple pools, polished dining options, and a rooftop bar that draws guests and visitors alike. With 6,487 reviews averaging 4.8 out of 5, the praise is well-earned. Practical tip: book a sea-view room for sunrise, and make time for the rooftop bar at sunset. Two golden moments, one stay.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the light hit that infinity pool and you'll understand why InterContinental Phu Quoc Long Beach Resort sits at 4.8 stars. Sweeping Bãi Trường views, cocktails above the treetops, and rooms that make it genuinely hard to leave. This is what a Phu Quoc splurge looks like done right.

instagram.caption: Beachfront luxury on Bãi Trường, Phu Quoc's finest stretch of sand. InterContinental Phu Quoc Long Beach Resort brings chic rooms, dreamy pools, and a rooftop bar to the table. Rated 4.8/5 across 6,487 reviews. Yeah, it lives up to the hype.
instagram.video_caption: Pool. Beach. Rooftop bar with endless ocean views. InterContinental Phu Quoc Long Beach Resort on Bãi Trường is doing luxury the right way. 4.8 stars, 6,487 guests can't be wrong.

tiktok.caption: This Phu Quoc resort is giving infinity pools, rooftop sunsets & beachfront vibes on Bãi Trường. 4.8 stars for a reason. #PhuQuoc #LuxuryTravel #VietnamTravel #BeachResort

video_script.cta: Save this for your Phu Quoc trip

facebook.caption: Premier Village Phu Quoc Resort sits at the very southern tip of the island on Mũi Ông Đội, surrounded by sea on three sides. With a 4.8 out of 5 from nearly 7,000 reviews, it consistently ranks among the most loved stays in Phu Quoc. The resort is famous for its over-water and beachfront pool villas, giving guests a private slice of the ocean without sharing it with anyone. Practical tip: the An Thới area is quieter than the north, so book a taxi or scooter if you want to explore town.
facebook.video_caption: Watch the sun drop behind the sea from three different angles at once. Premier Village Phu Quoc Resort wraps around Mũi Ông Đội so the water follows you everywhere. Nearly 7,000 guests gave it a 4.8, and these clips show exactly why the pool villa life here is so hard to leave.

instagram.caption: Three sides of ocean, private pool villas, and a 4.8 from nearly 7,000 guests. Premier Village Phu Quoc Resort on Mũi Ông Đội is the kind of place that makes leaving feel genuinely difficult. Pure southern Phu Quoc magic.
instagram.video_caption: Pool on one side, ocean on the other, and nowhere you actually need to be. Premier Village Phu Quoc Resort on Mũi Ông Đội earns that 4.8 rating every single sunrise.

tiktok.caption: Three sides of ocean at Premier Village Phu Quoc Resort. Nearly 7,000 reviews, rated 4.8. This southern tip of Phu Quoc hits different. #PhuQuoc #LuxuryTravel #VietnamTravel #ResortLife

scenes: Southern tip of Phu Quoc island
Private pool villas over the water
Tip: rent a scooter to explore town
